ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station (city, region) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., airport, mountain, coastal) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date of decommission (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorological parameter */,
  "parameter_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorological data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where data was collected */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological parameter */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Quality flag indicating data validity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meteorological_data_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES meteorological_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for user authentication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorological data entry */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data entry is valid (true/false) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the data entry is invalid */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "quality_check_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_quality_check_by FOREIGN KEY ("quality_check_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_aggregations" (
  "aggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station for which data is aggregated */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the aggregation period */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the aggregation period */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the meteorological parameter */,
  "aggregation_type" TEXT /* Type of aggregation (e.g., average, sum, max) */,
  "value" REAL /* Aggregated value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES meteorological_parameters ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_aggregations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_data" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where calibration took place */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value or adjustment made */,
  "calibration_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_calibration_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibration_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., scheduled, unscheduled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_maintenance_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the event was recorded */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather event (e.g., storm, heatwave) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the weather event (e.g., low, moderate, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_events_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorological data entry */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the data entry */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Creation date of the data entry */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the data entry */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES meteorological_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_instruments" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument installed at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "instrument_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_calibration_history" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where calibration took place */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of calibration */,
  "calibration_value" REAL /* Calibration value or adjustment made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id")
)
